title: Looking for Category Manager at Zomato

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Zomato
jsonLd.description:
Join the Zomato family as a Category Manager in Jaipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Zomato:
Zomato is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato!
